name: Agent Compliance Dashboard
description: Scores all Copilot agent packages against organizational policy and NIST CM-8 requirements. Produces a compliance dashboard, audit workbook, and remediation emails.

triggers.description: Activates when user mentions agent compliance scoring, governance audits, or policy checks
weekly-compliance-scan — Runs compliance scoring every Monday at 06:00

actions.name: run-compliance-scan
actions.description: Score all agent packages against AGP-001 and NIST CM-8 requirements

inputs.name: scope
inputs.description: Scope: all, department, or specific agent

inputs.name: policyVersion
inputs.description: Policy version to score against (defaults to latest)

outputs.name: complianceReport
outputs.description: Compliance scores and findings for all agents

actions.name: generate-audit-workbook
actions.description: Generate an Excel audit workbook with compliance findings

outputs.name: workbookUrl
outputs.description: URL to the generated audit workbook

crossPracticeIntegrations.description: Agent inventory provides package data for compliance scoring
Non-compliant agents may trigger remediation change requests

hitlControls.reason: Blocking non-compliant agents requires management approval
Compliance exceptions require governance board approval

knowledgeSources.description: Agent packages from Package Management API
AGP-001 compliance requirements and scoring criteria
